info@surgico.com

Surgico is a leading manufacturer of lab equipment and provides a wide range of high-quality products. We produce dependable instruments that meet the diverse needs of our customers in various industries. Our product range includes Incubator, Lab Refrigerator, Freezer, Water Bath, Spectrophotometer, Ice Maker, Test Chamber, Ultrasonic Cleaner, Fume Hood and many more. We provide lab equipment designed with robust materials and ensure consistent performance and durability. They seamlessly integrate into a wide variety of research and testing environments.

We are ISO 9001:2015 certified, reflecting our commitment to maintaining stringent quality management systems that consistently meet regulatory requirements. Additionally, our product range is compliant with ISO 13485:2012 and ISO 13485:2016 standards, as well as ISO 14001:2015, ensuring dependable performance. Our laboratory facilities operate per ISO 17025:2017, guaranteeing precise testing and calibration. Furthermore, our products carry the CE mark, meet essential health, safety, and environmental standards, and adhere to Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) guidelines. We also hold a Certificate of Compliance under the 2014/35/EU Low Voltage Directive and 2014/32/EU Measuring Instruments Directive, ensuring that our products meet stringent safety standards.

Air Sampler


provides Biological Air Samplers with multi-hole design for distinct flow rates. These samplers use isokinetic sampling for exact results. We offer modern design, LCD display, microprocessor control, and a large sample storage capacity. They ensure ease of use in diverse scientific settings, prioritizing accuracy and efficiency. Our Samplers include rechargeable batteries and user-friendly controls for accurate operation.

Biological Air Sampler TRBS-601

Sampling Quantity : 3.53CFM/min

Sampling Range : 10 to 6000L

Catalog

Biological Air Sampler TRBS-602

Sampling Flow : 100 L/ min

Sampling Mode : Third gear design, sample size can be customized

Catalog
Microbial Air Sampler TRMA-601

Temperature : 10 to 35 ˚C

Relative Humidity : 10 to 90 % RH

Catalog
